title: KingdomsX
description: Battles for might, land and glory. A complex international land & team management plugin.
body:
![KingdomsX Official Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b37a3474151a50ff2801a93b1150ef617f6bfc8.png)

**Kingdoms is plugin similar to Factions which provides more advanced core features and
introduces new mechanics such as turrets, structures and invasions to make the game more fun.
Kingdoms is heavily optimized and easy to use.**

Currently the plugin is being constantly updated on the [discord](https://discord.gg/cKsSwtt) server. You can also join to get access to the latest updates free of charge as the plugin is more regularly updated there.
If you have any questions, I'll be glad to answer.
You can see the full list of features in the wiki.


# **Features**

## Interactive Help Pages

![A gif showing the interactive mechanism of /k help command](https://i.imgur.com/dyOFqOz.gif) 


## Advanced GUIs - Custom Ranks - Shields - Kingdom Settings

![A gif showing GUI layout of the plugin](https://i.imgur.com/j6oAgMS.gif)


## Advanced Command Auto Completions

![A gif showing the command tab completion feature](https://i.imgur.com/umukIff.gif)


## Interactive Map & Kingdom Information

![A gif showing the mechanism of /k map](https://i.imgur.com/ZILQTU8.gif)

## Land Indicators & Visualizers


![A gif showing land indicators of kingdom chunks](https://i.imgur.com/JN5P4D6.gif)



**[Turrets](https://i.imgur.com/sWZUEka.gif) & [Protection Signs](https://i.imgur.com/LedBHSS.gif)**


# **Notes**

* There is no guarantee that the plugin will be maintained for the old tested versions specified, in future updates. The plugin only supports the latest builds of the exact Minecraft versions labelled on the Kingdoms version.

* All the plugin features are only available for the latest Minecraft version specified. Older versions might be missing some features.
* The plugin is specifically designed to support Spigot. While Paper servers should not experience any issues, it will not work on Bukkit. Bugs caused by other forks of Spigot will not be fixed as they're mostly a bug with the server software.
* Only the features mentioned in the [wiki](https://github.com/CryptoMorin/KingdomsX/wiki/) will be provided. I'm not responsible if you misinterpret these features.
* The plugin is only compatible with the requirements specified in the [wiki](https://github.com/CryptoMorin/KingdomsX/wiki/Installation#system-requirements). Read the wiki before using the plugin.
